steps.assistant_text: gl_func_0006BD14 = 1080-customized __osPackReadData, the build-side sibling of gl_func_0006BC44 (osContGetReadData): clears the 15-word PIF buffer, pifstatus = CONT_CMD_EXE, builds an 8-byte read command (tx=1 rx=3, command byte passed as the u8 ARG, 4x 0xFF payload), stamps per-controller via swl/swr struct copies, terminates with 0xFE. IDO 5.3 -O1. Load-bearing: (1) pifstatus store via a DISTINCT struct-typed placeholder global (direct member access = 2-insn lui+sw with folded 0x3C; char*-cast arith = 3-insn la+sw; sharing D_00000000 CSEs the la with ptr -- third zero-symbol D_6BD14_pifram added per the D_*_store/load convention); (2) pifstatus store BEFORE ptr init; (3) ptr += 8 at loop-body end (not comma-update) so the ptr store fills the bne delay slot; i++/ptr temp numbering follows statement order.

metadata.verification: Byte-exact 61/61 words vs target asm AND vs baserom (linked .game_libs section, pad sidecar included); report.json fuzzy=100.0 for both functions in the extended carve unit.
